productDisplayName: Converse Unisex Tongue Triple Color Black Casual Shoes
description: converse is popular for its association with youth and popular music. This Jack Purcell sneakers, originally famed for its vintage fashion, now has contemporary appeal with it colour block styling. This neat, low-top versatile sneaker adds a preppy edge to your off-duty outfit. Ladies can style this shoe with dressy outfits for a Kristen Stewart quirk!UpperCanvas upper with reinforced heel overlay and contrast stitch detailLong canvas tongueLacing system with metal eyeletsMetal eyelets at the midsolePU coating on the toe boxCanvas inner with a padded insoleMidsolePU midsole with textured foxing at the toeOutsoleRubber outsole with waffle patterned grooves on the forefoot and midfootDiagonal patterning all overShoe careMake a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot water Rub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brush Wash off with lukewarm water
